calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 02:24:35 p.m. and concluding at 02:39:24 p.m.

Plaintiff James J. Lee and Frances E. Lee, Trustees of the Family Revocable Trust dated February 9, 2016 represented by Reilly Wilkinson, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant The Green Rush Group, Inc. not appearing.

TONY LORBER (Manager of Rental Property) is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Court has reviewed the case and all filings pertaining to this hearing, including the Complaint for Breach of Contract filed Jun-23-2021 and the Declaration of Tony Larber.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit A - Office Lease Agreement
Plaintiff's Exhibit B - Building Rules and Regulations
Plaintiff's Exhibit C - Disability Acess Obligations Notice

TONY LORBER is under direct examination and is examined by the Court. Witness attests that statements made in its declaration are true and correct.

The matter is submitted.
Court finds Plaintiff has proven allegations in its complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff James J. Lee and Frances E. Lee, Trustees of the Family Revocable Trust dated February 9, 2016, and against The Green Rish Group, Inc., as follows:

Security Deposit in the sum of $10,000.00 shall be applied to judgment.

1. Principal: $71,440.95
2. Attorney Fees: $3,466.50
3. Costs: $595.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $75,382.45

Proposed judgment signed.
